mapper.select: SELECT version_name AS latestVersion, COALESCE(build_number, version_code, 0) AS latestBuildNumber, COALESCE(is_force_update, force_update, FALSE) AS forceUpdate, download_url AS downloadUrl, CASE WHEN #{lang} LIKE 'ja%' THEN COALESCE(release_note_ja, release_note_zh, update_message, '') WHEN #{lang} LIKE 'en%' THEN COALESCE(release_note_en, release_note_zh, update_message, '') ELSE COALESCE(release_note_zh, update_message, '') END AS releaseNote, min_supported_version AS minSupportedVersion FROM app_version WHERE deleted = 0 AND platform = #{platform} AND (release_percent IS NULL OR release_percent > 0) ORDER BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(is_latest, FALSE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, COALESCE(build_number, version_code, 0) DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
